headline: UBS Raises its Price Target on Public Storage (PSA)
summary: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) is one of the 12 Most Profitable Stocks to Invest In. On May 18, 2026, UBS analyst Michael Goldsmith raised the firm’s price target on Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) to $314 from $276 previously and maintained a Neutral rating on the shares. Meanwhile, Goldman Sachs raised the firm’s price target on Public Storage […]

headline: Public Storage: An Inherently Attractive Business Model
summary: During the quarter, we reestablished a position in Public Storage, the best-in-class self-storage REIT with a portfolio of more than 3,500 U.S. properties.
